mapper.sql: select apply_id, apply_no, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_status, process_instance_id, reject_reason, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_checkin_apply
mapper.insert:
insert into lc_checkin_apply
apply_no, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_status, process_instance_id, reject_reason, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{applyNo}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyUserName}, #{applyStatus}, #{processInstanceId}, #{rejectReason}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from lc_checkin_apply where apply_id in
#{applyId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.apply_id AS applyId, a.apply_no AS applyNo, b.elderly_name AS elderlyName, b.id_card AS idCard, e.bed_no AS bedNo, a.create_time AS createTime, a.apply_user_name AS createBy, f.checkin_time AS checkinTime, b.phone AS phone, b.gender AS gender, b.age AS age, e.care_fee AS careFee, e.room_fee AS roomFee, e.total_fee AS totalFee, f.contract_no AS contractNo, f.sign_time AS signTime, f.pay_status AS payStatus FROM lc_checkin_apply a LEFT JOIN lc_checkin_basic b ON a.apply_id = b.apply_id AND b.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN lc_checkin_config e ON a.apply_id = e.apply_id AND e.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN lc_checkin_contract f ON a.apply_id = f.apply_id AND f.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.apply_id = #{applyId} AND a.del_flag = '0'
